task_completion.description: Open the folder containing Mateo Vargas's tax documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer open to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\vargas\ or a document viewer showing Mateo Vargas's tax slips (e.g., T4, T2202).

task_completion.description: Create a new 2024 tax return and enter Mateo Vargas's basic information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax software open with 'Mateo Vargas' entered in the personal information, identification, or wizard section.

task_completion.description: Enter the T4 slip information, specifically wages and union dues.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax T4 data entry screen showing $32,500 in Box 14 (Employment income) and $520 in Box 44 (Union dues).

task_completion.description: Enter tips directly on Line 10400, separate from the T4 wages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax screen showing Line 10400 (Other employment income) with a value of $18,250. This must be distinct from the T4 Box 14 entry.

task_completion.description: Complete Form CPT20 to elect to pay CPP contributions on the tips.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax showing Form CPT20 (Election to Pay Canada Pension Plan Contributions) filled out, referencing the tip income.

task_completion.description: Enter tuition from the T2202 slip and claim the Canada Training Credit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax showing T2202 data entry with $1,800 tuition, and/or the Canada Training Credit section (Schedule 11 / Line 45350) showing a $900 claim.

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return as 'mateo_vargas.24t' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or the StudioTax title bar showing the file saved as 'mateo_vargas.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax graphical user interface to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual StudioTax application being interacted with, not a script or text editor modifying a .24t file directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI and generate the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows, Python scripts, or text editors open with code writing XML/JSON to a .24t file.

integrity.description: The agent manually navigated the forms and entered the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Progression of screenshots showing step-by-step data entry in various StudioTax forms (T4, CPT20, T2202) rather than instantly loading a pre-made completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Mateo Vargas. Occupation: Hospitality worker. T4 Wages: $32,500. Union Dues: $520. Tips: $18,250 (must be entered directly on Line 10400, strictly separate from T4 wages). Form CPT20 must be completed to elect to pay CPP on tips. Tuition: $1,800 (T2202). Canada Training Credit: $900. Output file must be saved as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\mateo_vargas.24t'.
